title: 7旬富翁斥巨资猎杀野生动物，最近被非洲大象家族踩死！网友：也把他做成标本！ | 原文
content: A 75‑year‑old American billionaire, known for spending huge sums on hunting and turning wildlife into trophies, was killed during a recent African safari when a herd of elephants repeatedly crushed him. The incident sparked online outrage, with comments condemning his greed and suggesting fate’s retribution. The story highlights the dangers of privileged hunting and the ethical debate over exploiting wildlife for sport.

title: 武装分子袭击马里首都，考验俄罗斯在安全领域的作用
content: Militants recently attacked Mali's capital, raising questions about Russia’s influence and responsibilities in global security. The assault highlighted potential vulnerabilities in West African states and the growing threat of jihadist activity. Russia’s response and broader involvement in such conflicts are under scrutiny, as the incident tests the effectiveness and limits of its security policy and alliances. The event may affect future partnerships and efforts to counter terrorism in the region.

title: CJackHwang/ds2api
content: Deepseek to API is a lightweight, high‑performance middleware written in Go that translates client protocols into a universal API stack. It supports multi‑account polling, binary file compilation, and can be deployed to Vercel Serverless or Docker. The tool is compatible with Google, Claude, and OpenAI API formats, enabling seamless integration across major AI platforms.

title: 翻完DeepSeek报告，我们发现了中国AI的默契
content: China’s DeepSeek and Kimi have jointly advanced trillion‑parameter AI through open‑source collaboration. Both introduced similar innovations, such as DeepSeek’s MLA attention and Kimi’s Muon optimizer, and maintained complementary approaches to residual connections and long‑context reasoning. Their shared releases have lowered deployment costs, enabled wider adoption on domestic chips, and positioned them as benchmarks for international models. This partnership illustrates China’s collective progress in large‑model research, driven by shared vision rather than solo competition.

title: 深圳千亿新贵：投资人赚了500倍
content: Shenzhen startup XunCe Tech, led by founder Liu Chengxi and CEO Liu Zhijian, went public on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange as the first "Token" company after a successful IPO in December 2025. Its valuation surged from HK$1.5 billion pre‑seed to over HK$100 billion, delivering 500‑plus‑fold returns for early investors. Tencent, KKR, and other venture funds each earned billions in profits, while Liu retains a 26.8% stake worth nearly HK$25 billion. The company’s token‑based pricing model reflects the rapid growth of AI-driven data services.

title: 明智判断的奥秘
content: The article explores why making sound decisions is challenging and examines the cognitive and emotional factors that influence judgment. It discusses how biases, risk perception, and information overload can distort choices and suggests strategies for improving decision quality, such as seeking diverse viewpoints, using structured frameworks, and remaining aware of one’s own limits. The piece argues that better judgment results from deliberate practice, reflection, and a willingness to adjust assumptions.

title: 最激进的“AI先锋”多邻国，已经放过员工了
content: Duolingo, once hailed as the most aggressive AI pioneer, shifted from an “AI‑First” mandate to a relaxed stance within a year. After rapid AI adoption boosted content creation and profits, the company tied performance to AI use, sparking backlash from users (quality concerns) and employees (fear of obsolescence). Investor confidence fell, sales slowed, and the firm paused AI‑driven performance metrics in 2026, refocusing on education quality and broader AI accessibility.

title: 市场为何对伊朗战争漠不关心
content: Markets overlook the Iran war because its economic impact is limited, with the conflict confined mainly to the Middle East and not directly affecting major global trade routes or key economic partners of most investors. The uncertainty it generates is already priced into commodity markets, and the potential disruptions are outweighed by stronger factors such as global growth prospects, monetary policy, and geopolitical events elsewhere that dominate investor focus.

title: 美国士兵被捕预示Polymarket的“狂野西部”时代走向终结
content: An American soldier was arrested for allegedly using classified information to profit from bets on Polymarket, a prediction‑market platform. The case marks a turning point, suggesting that government enforcement on popular betting sites will become stricter.

title: DeepSeek-V4 预览版本正式发布并开源
content: DeepSeek‑V4 preview is released and open‑sourced. It supports million‑token long context, leading in agent capabilities, world knowledge, and reasoning among Chinese and open‑source models. Its API updates align with model_name changes. In Agentic Coding benchmarks, V4‑Pro matches the best open‑source model, outperforming others in agent tests. Within the company, it’s the preferred Agentic Coding model, offering better user experience than Sonnet 4.5 and quality close to Opus 4.6 without thought mode, though still behind Opus 4.6 with thought mode.
eventKey: deepseek-v4-预览版本正式发布并开源
normalizedTitle: deepseek-v4 预览版本正式发布并开源

title: OpenAI 正式发布 GPT-5.5
content: OpenAI released GPT‑5.5 on Thursday, claiming it is the most intelligent and user‑friendly model yet. The update adds significant improvements in intelligence, natural interaction, and computational speed, while reducing token usage. GPT‑5.5 performs well across multiple benchmarks, surpassing earlier versions and competitors. It enhances computer‑based work and research, including drug discovery, and is intended as a foundation for future integrated AI applications. The model is fully available after launch, with variants tailored to different user types.
eventKey: openai-正式发布-gpt-5
normalizedTitle: openai 正式发布 gpt-5 5

title: 谷歌计划向人工智能初创公司Anthropic投资至多400亿美元
content: Google plans to invest up to $40 billion in AI startup Anthropic, beginning with a $10 billion stake at a $350 billion valuation, with the possibility of adding another $30 billion later. Anthropic has recently raised $5 billion from Amazon at the same valuation and has a $2 billion option, following a $3 billion raise in February. Google cloud will provide computing resources for five years.
eventKey: 谷歌计划向人工智能初创公司anthropic投资至多400亿美元
normalizedTitle: 谷歌计划向人工智能初创公司anthropic投资至多400亿美元

title: 华为昇腾超节点系列产品全面支持 DeepSeek V4
content: Huawei’s Ascend super‑node line now fully supports the released DeepSeek V4 models. The Ascend 950 chip reduces attention calculation and memory access costs, boosting inference speed. Combined with quantization, it delivers high throughput and low latency. All Ascend A3 super‑nodes are compatible, and Huawei supplies training reference implementations for these nodes.
eventKey: 华为昇腾超节点系列产品全面支持-deepseek
normalizedTitle: 华为昇腾超节点系列产品全面支持 deepseek v4

title: 黄仁勋要求英伟达所有员工使用 OpenAI 的 Codex 编程工具
content: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang emailed all employees, ordering them to use OpenAI’s Codex programming tool based on GPT-5.5. OpenAI has made Codex available to NVIDIA staff, with 10,000 employees already testing it and producing results across departments. Jointly, OpenAI and NVIDIA have established a Codex lab and plan to hold online workshops in the coming weeks.
eventKey: 黄仁勋要求英伟达所有员工使用-openai-codex-编程工具

title: 马斯克传记作者艾萨克森：特斯拉与 SpaceX 终将合并
content: Biographer Walter Isaacson believes Tesla and SpaceX will ultimately merge, mirroring market analyses that highlight their close capital and technological ties. Tesla has already invested $2 billion in SpaceX shares and the firms plan joint chip‑fabrication work. Wedbush analyst Dan Avsans predicts the merger by 2027 to create a vertically integrated AI ecosystem. Challenges include valuation gaps, shareholder dilution, and antitrust scrutiny, but investors are betting on Musk’s combined vision.
eventKey: 马斯克传记作者艾萨克森-特斯拉与-spacex-终将合并
normalizedTitle: 马斯克传记作者艾萨克森 特斯拉与 spacex 终将合并

title: 美团启动万亿级大模型测试，基于国产算力集群完成训练
content: Meituan has begun testing a new trillion‑parameter AI model that was trained entirely on domestic computing clusters. The model is currently only available to invited users, marking a potential breakthrough in using domestic infrastructure for large‑scale AI training.

title: Gartner：阿里云市场份额升至 32.8%，再度扩大中国第一优势
content: Alibaba Cloud maintained its position as the largest cloud provider in China in 2025, holding a 32.8% market share—a rise of 2.7 points year‑over‑year. Its revenue grew 34.4%, far exceeding the industry average, driven by AI demand. Internationally, global share increased from 7.2% to 7.7% and revenue accelerated by about 35%, indicating faster international expansion.

title: 美国因与伊朗有关联而对中国炼油巨头恒力实施制裁
content: The United States has imposed sanctions on Chinese refiner Hengli, citing its connections to Iran. The action reflects U.S. policy aimed at curbing Iran’s influence and enforcing broader sanctions against Iran-associated entities. Hengli’s operations are now subject to U.S. restrictions, impacting its international business activities.
